message:
fix(tui,daemon): fix test assertions, remove duplicate field, add scripted replay

- Fix case-sensitive frame assertions: "green"→"GREEN", "red"→"RED" to
  match actual render output format
- Remove duplicate notification_manager field from MonitoringDaemon
- Add HarnessStep enum and scripted replay support to test harness
- Add trace_digest() for deterministic transition verification
- Remove #![cfg(test)] from test_artifact (needed by e2e_artifact)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
